summary.sosovalue: Predominantly positive community sentiment. Users frequently cite SoSoValue as a reliable source for crypto data, ETF flows, and market insights (e.g., DOT ETF, BTC ETF outflows). Many promotional posts highlight its AI-powered analytics, real-time data, and upcoming Season 2 airdrop (30M tokens). Replies to official posts are supportive ('Sosovalue on top', '🔥'). No significant negative mentions.
summary.sodex: Positive hype around SoDEX as a DEX with transparent SoPoints system, weekly airdrop distributions (150M $SOSO incentives), low competition, and features like referrals, vaults, and governance. Users praise anti-sybil measures, CEX-like speed on L1 ValueChain, and community-first approach (e.g., skipping KYC fees for rewards). Some minor critiques on liquidity and token unlocks, but overall excitement for farming.
summary.ssi: Limited direct discussion on 'SSI Index'. Isolated mentions of sector indices like ssiSocialFi, ssiAI, ssiMeme declining amid market correction, treated neutrally as data points. No strong sentiment; appears referenced in SoSoValue context without praise or criticism.
